name: Compressor (audio chain v1)
author: KB2UKA
description: VCA-style single-stage compressor — first of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 blocks per issue #332. Threshold / ratio / attack / release / soft-knee / makeup gain + bypass toggle. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency. SVG transfer-function curve, rotary knobs, segmented LED meters, brass-plate header with Bypass switch.
